name: BICUSPID AORTIC VALVE
definition: single fused commissure at birth resulting in 2 separate cusps of unequal size (usually fused L

demographics.Histo: cystic medial degeneration; ↑ levels of matrix metalloproteinases; ↓ levels of fibrillin-1
demographics.Associated with: dilatation of aortic root (50%) + ascending aorta + transverse arch aortic;

clinical.Cx: stenosis, regurgitation, endocarditis, aneurysmal dilatation of ascending aorta, aortic
